allow: PowerShell($items = Get-ChildItem -Path "D:\\code\\sba-simc" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($items.Count -eq 0\) { Write-Output "No items found" } else { $items | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "$\($_.FullName\) [$\(if \($_.PSIsContainer\) { 'DIR' } else { 'FILE' }\)]" } })

PowerShell(Test-Path "D:\\code\\sba-simc"; if \(\(Test-Path "D:\\code\\sba-simc"\) -eq $true\) { Write-Output "Path exists"; $fullPath = Resolve-Path "D:\\code\\sba-simc"; Write-Output "Resolved: $fullPath"; Get-Item "D:\\code\\sba-simc" } else { Write-Output "Path does not exist" })
